value.title: Dow Jones Futures: Mixed Market Signals As Micron's Gain Is Apple's Pain
value.summary: The Nasdaq reversed lower again while the Dow came off record highs. Micron soared but Apple led other tech titans lower.

value.title: OpenAI Mulls Delaying IPO Until 2027: Report
value.summary: An OpenAI IPO may not happen this year. Advisors are telling CEO Sam Altman to wait, citing the SpaceX IPO and recent market action.

value.title: Stock Market Today, June 25: Microsoft Falls as AI Spending Concerns Pressure Cloud Margin Outlook
value.summary: Microsoft’s Azure growth remains a key support for the stock, with investors weighing whether AI demand can offset the rising cost of building cloud capacity.
